stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
Identify the best description of the air mass at point Y (41°N 12°W) in relation to the nearby fronts.

options.a: Behind a warm front, in warm air.
options.b: Ahead a cold front, in warm air.
options.c: Cold air mass and there is a cold front ahead.
options.d: Behind a warm front, in cold air.
